=zQUmxPbLpye*x(Khw$e: HealthDrain: [Makes opponent's notes make you lose health]
FreeplayDialog [Makes dialog play for this song in freeplay]
OpponentShake [Makes opponent's notes shake the screen]
CustomDeath: [Changes the death animation for this song]
NoMiss [Makes any misses result in death on this song]
ForceMidScroll [Forces the player into middle scroll mode]
AddOpponent: [Adds another character on the enemy's side]
- Value 2: ID (Can be a number or a letter like a, 3, g etc.)
SetHealthIcon: [Sets the opponent's health bar icon to the specified name]
BW [Makes all characters and the background in black and white]
- Value 1: Music name (Player must have (Value)Game over loop + end sounds)
RsEndU,tq:yk@;#tA`^!: __CUSTOM NOTE PROPERTIES LIST
KeepColor [Makes the custom note not use arrow colors]
IgnoreMiss [Makes not hitting this note not count as a miss]
BotIgnores [Bot will miss this note in botplay]
EnemyIgnores [Enemy will miss this note]
HurtOnHit [Makes htting this note deal damage to the player]
- Value 1: Damage dealt on hit
ShakeOnHit [Makes the screen shake when this note is hit]
KeepRotation [Makes this note stay the right way up]
ModifyMissHealth [Changes the health lost by missing this note]
- Value 1: Health to lose on miss
ModifyHitHealth [Changes the health gained by hitting this note]
- Value 1: Health to gain on hit
AssignAnim [Makes the character play an animation]
- Value 1: Player/Opponent/Giga
- Value 2: Animation name
- Value 3: OnHit/OnMiss/Both
AssignDirectionalAnim [Makes the character play animation name + Direction]
- Value 1: P1/P2/Giga
- Value 2: Animation prefix (For example, "Dodge" would be DodgeLeft, DodgeRight)
- Value 3: OnHit/OnMiss/Both
AddSound [Makes a sound play when this note is hit]
- Value 1: Hit sound
- Value 2: OnHit/OnMiss/Both
StopKeyAnim [Makes the regular singing animation not play for this note]
/Hh?nLmEV7Mc+.HUi-k(: ShakyText [Makes the letters shake when they appear]
Shout [Makes the character portrait and text box shake when they appear]
Ghost [Makes the letters fade away when they appear[
Autoskip [Makes the text automatically skip after being fully typed out]
TextColor [Changes text color (Example: green / white / red)]

MESSAGE: SSS Pig Of Good Luck: Born in the year 2563 bc from the molten glass of Shindong, China [1], the SSS Pig Of Luck is an ancient artifact which is stated from Greek philosophers that whichever Scratch's Smooth Saturdays mod it is inserted to will have a 100% chance of winning that mods Mod Of The Month.[2]

Historians say the four leaf clover on its chest has the power to end the entire SSS Community if unleashed from the pigs grasp.[3] Therefore the SSS Pig Of Good Luck is one of the most important relics in the Scratch's Smooth Saturday subspace.

ptbA`v:]_Kk^|rS+RDK@: I'm going to kill you loolololololololoolololol you suck you suck you idiot

OIxEZb90VOQPpo*,G@Ci: Yeah it was honestly kinda funny, nobody knew where the elephant even came from.
purr
Sigh.... It is kinda boring around here, right.
Well hey, I've been wanting to practice some singing recently.
You think you could help me out?
Me too actually
I'm getting into rap music
Huh, neat.
Well, let's just take it in turns I guess. I'll start.
You did come back!
Well, you've already beaten the song so...
Botplay and debug menu are allowed this time.
uh
Look I get these secret songs are supposed to be mysterious
But this is just a black screen
Let me ask you something.
Why do you think reloading the song will let you use botplay?
uhh I didn't think you'd notice
Trust me. I always notice.
Why do you think I let people skip the dialog if they reload the song?
because its so long
yup lol
Can I ask you a question?
meow?
Yes, you.
Look this dialog has been rewritten like 7 times so
I'm just gonna say something corny and dumb then we're gonna battle.
Why do you think so many people are afraid to express themselves?
Why do you think so many bottle up their thoughts and emotions?
I feel like there's 2 types of people.
People who say not to bottle things up and to talk about stuff.
And then those who go "Cringe, didn't ask! Ratio!" when people do try to talk
what
My point is...
People shouldn't have to feel like this.
In this world, I've seen so many cases of... well...
Harassment, arguing, fighting.. Over what people think is cringe.
I just don't see the point.
ok
Well uh, maybe I'm rambling on too much.
Here's a different question with a similar answer.
Why do you think I've been hiding for almost a year?
Wait you're the girl from foolish friday
mhm.
Didn't you kill a version of me from an alternate dimension in a brutal fashion?
uhhhhhhh
That was uhh
She said something really mean.
Also, a whole year? What?
Yeah. It's been a while.
I came back because... well,
Look squigglytuff needs to get over his fear of people judging him so I forced myself into his game.
And what better way to greet you than a rap battle? Right?
Yeah that's kinda the logic of this world
I have a few conditions though.
1. No ghost tapping.
2. No botplay.
3. No debug menu.
I have no idea what any of those things are
Don't worry about it. Not important to you.
Well, let's go then.
That was fun. Thanks.
Plus thanks for being so cool about this.
wdym
Well, I just thought.... eh, forget it.
Maybe I shouldn't assume people will immediately hate me on first glance.
Even if it is party true.
But considering that whole lecture I gave you about cringe... idk lol
Not sure what you mean, I've seen plenty of knockoff characters
No reason why I would hate you specifically
There's a very important other reason why you would hate me.
But thanks I guess.
And also, on behalf of squiggly.
Thanks for playing.
You're pretty good at this, and I hope you go far with this career of yours.
thanks
One more thing... Can you tell elephant and spritemissing ashley says hi?
That's kinda partly why I came here but I don't think I'll find them any time soon.
We'll try make sure they get the message.
Thank you.
Well, I'm out. See you again sometime maybe.
